Letra_cifra:
Em       - D                          - C
    Miss me,       I know you'll miss me,       I know 
you'll miss me blind !
Em                       - D
  I know you'll miss me,       I know you'll miss me,
C                           Em  - D
     I know you'll miss me bli…...nd !   (2x)

   Em                       D
1. Bet you got a good gun, bet you know how
        C                  D
    to have some fun and then
        Em                D
    you turn it around on me because
         C                           D
    I'm better than the rest of the men.

      Em          D       Am             C
    I say you'll miss me, and you always do,
      Em          D            Am             C
    I say you'll miss me, now would I lie to you ?

                    Am                    Em     D
    Now there's no need to demand grab my golden hand,
          Am                  Em        D
    I'll teach you and you'll never be sure,
           Am                        Em         D
    if the way that you need is too much like greed,
      Am              Em              D
    decide if you are rich or you're poor.

Em                       - D
  I know you'll miss me,       I know you'll miss me,
C                          Em  - D
     I know you'll miss me bli…...nd !   (2x)

   Em                          D
2. Bet you make the fool run, bet you know how
        C              D
    to make it last forever,
        Em                  D
    but you know I'm never really sure,
               C                   D
    if you're just kissing to be clever.

      Em          D       Am             C
    I say you'll miss me, and you always do,
      Em          D            Am             C
    I say you'll miss me, now would I lie to you ?
                    Am                    Em     D
    Now there's no need to demand grab my golden hand,
          Am                  Em        D
    I'll teach you and you'll never be sure,
           Am                        Em         D
    if the way that you need is too much like greed,
      Am              Em              D
    decide if you are rich or you're poor.

                Cm            F
    Because this love that I have to give
            Cm                F
    must be better than that kind,
           Cm                    F
    it can make you rich it can make you poor,
           Cm                      Am
    but I know that you'll miss me blind.

Em                        D
  I know you'll miss me,       I know you'll miss me,
